question_text: Can you explain when emergency rollback is mandatory for API incidents?

retrieved.title: Incident Playbook
retrieved.text:
# Incident Playbook

For API incidents, emergency rollback is mandatory if **p95 latency exceeds 1200 ms for 10 consecutive minutes**.

Primary paging system is **Solar Pager**.

Severity levels: S0 outage, S1 critical degradation, S2 moderate degradation, S3 low impact.

retrieved.title: Data Policy
retrieved.text:
# Data Policy

Raw event logs are retained for **400 days**.

Full backups run Sunday 02:30 UTC and are retained for 30 days.

retrieved.title: Release Notes Policy
retrieved.text:
# Release Notes Policy

Weekly release train is **Tuesday 16:00 UTC**.

Deployments begin with **8% canary traffic** and are promoted after 45 minutes if error rate stays below 0.6%.

question_text: What is the enterprise first response SLA and where do escalations go?

retrieved.title: Support Handbook
retrieved.text:
# Support Handbook

Enterprise first-response SLA is **20 minutes**.

Urgent escalations must be posted in **#support-escalation** with ticket ID and impact summary.

retrieved.title: Release Notes Policy
retrieved.text:
# Release Notes Policy

Weekly release train is **Tuesday 16:00 UTC**.

Deployments begin with **8% canary traffic** and are promoted after 45 minutes if error rate stays below 0.6%.
